prompts.name: Reading
prompts.text: Show the subject reading a book naturally, with focused expression, relaxed posture, and a calm atmosphere.

prompts.name: Writing
prompts.text: Show the subject writing in a notebook or journal with thoughtful focus and natural hand placement.

prompts.name: Drawing
prompts.text: Show the subject sketching or drawing with creative concentration, visible tools, and relaxed posture.

prompts.name: Cooking
prompts.text: Show the subject cooking with utensils, ingredients, active hand movement, and a lively kitchen setting.

prompts.name: Drinking
prompts.text: Show the subject enjoying a drink naturally, with believable hand placement and a relaxed mood.

prompts.name: Dancing
prompts.text: Show the subject dancing gracefully with flowing motion, expressive pose, and rhythmic energy.

prompts.name: Singing
prompts.text: Show the subject singing with expressive emotion, performance posture, and clear stage or casual context.

prompts.name: Playing Instrument
prompts.text: Show the subject playing a musical instrument with believable hand placement and engaged expression.

prompts.name: Shopping
prompts.text: Show the subject shopping with bags, storefront detail, casual movement, and everyday atmosphere.

prompts.name: Waiting for Train
prompts.text: Show the subject waiting at a train platform with natural posture and urban transit atmosphere.

prompts.name: Using Phone
prompts.text: Show the subject using a phone with realistic hand placement, soft screen glow, and modern casual context.

prompts.name: Taking Photo
prompts.text: Show the subject taking a photo with a camera or phone, using a clear pose and focused expression.

prompts.text: Show the subject casting a spell with controlled magical energy, confident posture, and readable hand gesture.

prompts.name: Resting
